news.t: Invesco S&P 500 Pure Growth ETF Among Today's US Growth Smart Beta ETFs

Analysts Expect The iShares Core S&P U.S. Growth ETF To Hit $70
Analysts See 10% Gains Ahead For The iShares Core S&P U.S. Growth ETF

holdings.infoBox: IUSG is an equity ETF with a total of 392 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 13.77%, Microsoft at 7.92%, Apple at 5.80%, Alphabet at 5.78%, and Broadcom at 4.98%.

overview.description: The iShares Core S&P U.S. Growth ETF (IUSG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 900 Growth index. The fund tracks an index of US large- and mid-cap growth stocks. The index selects from stocks ranked 1-3000 by market cap based on fundamental growth factors. IUSG was launched on Jul 24, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
